text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Palmer reaches 9,000 followers. The best
part is that these are fans of the real Mejiro
Palmer, not the one pretending to be a model
student.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Feeling both the joys and hardships of living
freely, Mejiro Palmer regains some of the
childlike joy of living in the moment.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her next goal is the Hakodate Kinen. She decides
to take a new step forward at this summer G3
race in Hokkaido.
